session.user:
Run the following command and report results. Do NOT fix anything, just report:
``` cd /home/runner/work/erk/erk && uv run ruff check src/ tests/ 2>&1 | tail -20 ```
Report whether all checks passed or list any failures.
session.assistant: I'll execute the ruff check command and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ruff check src/ tests/ 2>&1 | tail -20
Run ruff linting check on src/ and tests/ directories

session.assistant:
**ruff passed: All checks passed!**
The ruff linting check completed successfully with no violations found in the `src/` and `tests/` directories.
